metadata.siteTitle: LoLA — AI Avatars That Coach, Sell & Grow
metadata.siteDescription: Build a photorealistic AI avatar that posts to social media and has real-time voice conversations with anyone who clicks.
metadata.pricingDescription: Start free with 1 avatar and 50 sessions/month. Scale to Creator or Pro for unlimited avatars and social publishing.
metadata.featuresDescription: Adaptive coaching, social media automation, real-time voice, credit billing, and more.
metadata.howItWorksDescription: Create an AI avatar in minutes, publish to social, and let anyone talk to it.
metadata.termsDescription: Terms of Service for the LoLA AI avatar platform, operated by ORBWEVA.
metadata.privacyDescription: Privacy Policy for the LoLA AI avatar platform. Learn how we handle your data.

login.title: Sign in to continue
login.checkEmail: Check your email for a magic link.

dashboard.coachingDesc: Your sessions adapt to your learning style.
dashboard.quizDesc: Take a 30-second quiz to personalize your experience.
dashboard.noSessions: No sessions yet. Try talking to an avatar!

session.micDesc: LoLA needs your microphone for voice conversations. Please allow mic access in your browser settings and reload the page.
session.micStep1: 1. Tap the lock/info icon in your browser address bar
session.noCreditsDesc: You need credits to start a voice session. Each minute of conversation costs 1 credit.
session.connectionLostDesc: The voice connection dropped after multiple reconnection attempts. This can happen with unstable networks.
session.sessionFailedDesc: Something went wrong starting the voice session. Please try again.
session.speakNaturally: Just speak naturally — {name} is multilingual and adapts to you.
session.startTalking: Just start talking — {name} will respond. Speak any language. Tap to dismiss.

summary.optionalFeedback: What went well? What could improve?

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Start free, scale as you grow
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.creator: Creator

features.label: Platform
features.title: Built for scale
features.subtitle: Everything you need to create, deploy, and monetize AI avatars.
features.adaptiveCoachingDesc: 12 evidence-based principles personalize every conversation to the individual. The engine adapts in real-time based on learner responses, energy, and progress.
features.socialPipelineDesc: AI-generated content published to 9 platforms automatically via Blotato. Contextual captions, optimal timing, and consistent voice across every channel.
features.creditSystemDesc: Per-minute billing keeps it simple. Users buy credits to talk, creators earn revenue from every conversation. Transparent pricing for everyone.
features.multiDomainDesc: Language coaching, fitness, sales, mentoring, support — one platform handles it all. Domain-agnostic architecture means your avatar works in any vertical.
features.characterConsistencyDesc: FLUX Kontext Pro ensures your avatar looks the same everywhere — across social posts, profile images, and marketing materials. One identity, every surface.
features.realtimeVoiceDesc: OpenAI Realtime API with WebRTC delivers sub-second latency. Natural, fluid conversations that feel human — not like talking to a chatbot.

creator.name: Name
creator.sceneExpired: Scene images have expired. Regenerate them from the avatar creation flow.
creator.generatingWait: This takes ~15 seconds for all 10 voices...
creator.voiceUpdated: Voice updated to "{voice}". Regenerating voice preview...
creator.voiceUpdatedPreview: Voice updated to "{voice}" and preview regenerated.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to your AI avatar
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to live conversations in under 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your avatar's personality, domain expertise, and appearance. Our AI generates a photorealistic character with consistent looks across all content.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your avatar gets a public profile page. Share it on social media, embed on your website, or let our pipeline auto-post engaging content.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Anyone can have a real-time voice conversation with your avatar. Users buy credits, you earn revenue from every session.

transcript.noMessages: No transcript available for this session.
